page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-8 is a memory-optimized server instance powered by the x86_64 AMD EPYC 9B14 processor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The system is equipped with 64 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, and has zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU capabilities, with stress-ng single-core performance and Geekbench text processing scoring in the top 25%. Multi-core operations, database tasks, and Redis SET operations fall within the average range. However, memory bandwidth tests reveal a bottleneck for large, uncached blocks, with read-only large block bandwidth scoring in the bottom 25% and write large block bandwidth falling into the bottom 10%.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the instance offers high memory density per vCPU, making it suitable for memory-bound workloads that do not require high-throughput uncached memory writes. It is well-suited for database operations, text processing, web serving, and moderate-scale software compilation.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-8 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 8 dedicated vCPUs and 64 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 9B14 x86_64 processor. It provides 8.0 GB of memory per core across 4 physical cores with hyper-threading. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Benchmark data shows strong single-core performance and text processing capabilities, alongside average multi-core, database, and Redis execution speeds. However, uncached memory write bandwidth is a notable bottleneck, scoring in the bottom 10%. This server is best suited for memory-intensive workloads such as database operations, text processing, and web serving where high memory-to-vCPU ratios are required but massive uncached memory write throughput is not critical.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-8 is a memory-optimized server with 8 vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and an AMD EPYC 9B14 CPU, delivering strong single-core performance for database and text processing workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-8 features 8 vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and an AMD EPYC CPU, optimized for memory-intensive database and text processing tasks.
tagline: An AMD EPYC powered virtual machine offering high memory density and strong single-core performance for memory-intensive database workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by AMD EPYC 9B14 processor with 8 dedicated vCPUs and 4 physical cores
Equipped with 64 GB RAM, offering a high 8.0 GB per vCPU memory ratio
Strong single-core CPU performance and text processing capabilities
Lacks local storage and GPU accelerators
Best suited for database operations, web serving, and text processing
